flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Holy Family University rose 22% between 2006 and 2009 ($18.4k → $22.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Holy Family University fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (50.6% → 42.1%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 12 pp at Holy Family University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (60.4% vs 72.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Holy Family University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.6k → $35.3k).
